hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: InГЎВёЖ’ear ScГѓВ©ine in Kenmare offers a spacious holiday home with four bedrooms and four bathrooms. Guests enjoy sea views and a private garden.
Modern Amenities: The property features free WiFi, a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and a dishwasher. Additional amenities include a walk-in shower, bidet, and a seating area.
